exporter: specimen_exporter.py v3 (Bundle G opt-in consumer adoption)

observation.state_lookup_note: v1: single-event proxy only. Bundle E will populate from label_state sidecar; until then freshness-lane exports are gated on this absence.

policy_artifact.rule_summary: Admits emitter_declared labels from a hand-curated allowlist of labeler/label pairs into Driftwatch's external_advisory_caveats roster. Each admission preserves the input's non_global_provenance caveat and is scoped to driftwatch's local state only. Roster is consulted by future cluster-report annotation; v1 produces state, does not yet wire downstream.

documented_expected_action.action_summary: Append (target, labeler_did, label_value, inherited_caveats) to data/consumer_policy/state/external_advisory_caveats.json; emit a receipt to data/consumer_policy/receipts/.
preconditions: input is a Labelwatch specimen_candidate (not blocked_candidate)
(input.labeler.did, input.label.value) is in Driftwatch's ADMITTED allowlist
documented_expected_action.downstream_effect_note: v1: roster is the consultable state. Future cluster-report code reads the roster to annotate/route claims involving labeled targets. The roster exists; downstream consumer code is parked.

action_receipt.discipline_note_from_receipt: consumer_scope is opt_in:driftwatch; this admission does NOT promote the underlying emitter_declared finding to global_platform. non_global_provenance is inherited and must be preserved by any downstream consumer that consults this roster.

state_basis.derivation_source: hand-authored fixture; cites real Driftwatch policy artifact (scripts/consumer_policy/policy.py v1.0.0 at commit b4a8e3e) and real receipt (data/consumer_policy/receipts/20260608_184805Z-3a6bb004a53d.json, sha 3a6bb004a53d...)
state_basis.note: Bundle G specimen-003. The cited Driftwatch policy artifact + receipt are real; specimen freshness still classifies as unknown_basis because no validity horizon is asserted (Driftwatch's policy could change at any time).
